text:
Market today: The mood is mixed with geopolitical tensions, but a strong positive for chips due to Micron's investment news. This provides a tailwind for your concentrated tech/chip book.

Your holdings: SOXL (-21.36%) is at its stop, needing immediate attention. SPAL (-22.41%), a leveraged ETF, is already below its stop. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on SOXL's price action around its stop. Also, watch for any follow-through in the broader chip sector after Micron's news.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions carefully and consider if chip strength offers new opportunities.
plays: SOXL: It's at its stop (200.14 vs. 200). Decide whether to trim/exit or adjust the stop, given its leveraged nature and decay.
SPAL: Already below its stop (19.51 vs. 21.38). Consider exiting or re-evaluating your risk on this leveraged ETF immediately.
TSM: The Micron news boosts chips. Scanner shows an ACCUMULATE setup for TSM (entry 438.82-437.47, stop 432.46). Consider if this aligns with your conviction.
